name: saman-seo
description: Asset build pipeline for the Saman SEO plugin

scripts.build:less: lessc --compress assets/less/admin.less build/css/admin.css && lessc --compress assets/less/editor.less build/css/editor.css && lessc --compress assets/less/plugin.less build/css/plugin.css && lessc --compress assets/less/breadcrumbs.less build/css/breadcrumbs.css && lessc --compress src-v2/less/v2.less src-v2/index.css
scripts.build: npm run build:less && npm run build:react && npm run build:editor && npm run build:admin-list
scripts.watch:less: concurrently "less-watch-compiler assets/less build/css admin.less --minified" "less-watch-compiler assets/less build/css editor.less --minified" "less-watch-compiler assets/less build/css plugin.less --minified" "less-watch-compiler assets/less build/css breadcrumbs.less --minified" "less-watch-compiler src-v2/less src-v2 v2.less --output-filename=index.css --minified"
scripts.watch: npm run build && npm run watch:less
scripts.validate: npm run build && npm run lint:js

author: Juan Denis
